Features

Lightning Fast

Our edge-first architecture ensures your users experience sub-millisecond latency no matter where they are in the world.

Fully Extensible

Build custom plugins using our SDK. Integrate with your existing tools through our REST and GraphQL APIs.

Enterprise Ready

From SSO to audit logs, we've built the compliance features your security team demands. SOC2 Type II certified since 2023.
